hero.title: Find nearby health centers and book diagnostic tests easily.
hero.subtitle: Access quality diagnostic services at affordable prices across rural health centers in Sri Lanka.
home.howItWorks.step1.title: Find a Health Center
home.howItWorks.step1.body: Browse nearby labs or search by name and location.
home.howItWorks.step2.title: Choose Your Test
home.howItWorks.step2.body: View available tests, prices, and preparation instructions.
home.howItWorks.step3.title: Book & Visit
home.howItWorks.step3.body: Book your test online and visit the lab at your convenience.
